utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. (2) property_coverage: specifies policy names, costs, discount, and total monthly—sufficient. (3) travel_coverage: specifies plan name and monthly cost—sufficient. (4) additional_services: lists services with monthly costs and notes a one-time fee—sufficient. (5) total_budget: includes monthly and annual totals—sufficient. Therefore, all 5 are included and fully specified.
